name: TPCH

collections.name: regions

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the region

properties.name: name
properties.description: Uppercase name of the region

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Comment/remark on the region

collections.description: The regions of the world

collections.name: nations

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the nation

properties.name: region_key
properties.description: Key from the region that the nation belongs to

properties.name: name
properties.description: Uppercase name of the nation

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Comment/remark on the nation

collections.description: The nations of the world

collections.name: parts

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the part

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the part, consisting of multiple lowercase colors

properties.name: manufacturer
properties.description: Name of the manufacturer of the part (not the same as the suppliers). The manufacturer number is the same as the first digit of the part's brand number.

properties.name: brand
properties.description: The production brand that the part belongs to. The brand contains two digits where the first digit is the same as the manufacturer number (e.g. Brand#32 is from Manufacturer #3).

properties.name: part_type
properties.description: The type of the part, consisting of three uppercase descriptors where the first is a category (e.g. 'STANDARD' or 'PROMO'), the second is a processing state (e.g. 'ANODIZED' or 'PLATED') and the third is a material (e.g. 'STEEL' or 'BRASS').

properties.name: size
properties.description: The size of the part

properties.name: container
properties.description: The container that the part is stored in. The container consists of two uppercase descriptors where the first is a size (e.g. 'SM' or 'JUMBO') and the second is a type of container (e.g. 'BOX' or 'JAR').

properties.name: retail_price
properties.description: The retail price of the part, which it is intended to be sold for before accounting for the price the supplier charges, in US dollars. The price is rounded to the nearest cent, and most of the values are between $900 and $2000.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Description/commentary on the part

collections.description: The various products supplied by various companies in shipments to different customers

correlations.brand: each brand is associated with exactly one manufacturer, and each manufacturer has exactly 5 distinct brands

collections.name: suppliers

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the supplier

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the supplier, which is always Supplier#<number> where the number is the same as the supplier's key, prepended with zeros until it is 9 digits

properties.name: address
properties.description: Address of the supplier as a cryptographically encrypted string to anonymize the data.

properties.name: nation_key
properties.description: Key from the nation that the supplier belongs to

properties.name: phone
properties.description: Phone number of the supplier in the format 'CC-XXX-XXX-XXXX' where CC is the country code (each nation has a unique country code).

properties.name: account_balance
properties.description: The account balance of the supplier in US dollars. The balance is rounded to the nearest cent and most of the values are between -$1,000 and +$10,000.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Commentary/remark on the supplier

collections.description: The various companies that supply different parts to fulfill purchase orders

collections.name: lines

properties.name: order_key
properties.description: Key from the order that the line item belongs to

properties.name: part_key
properties.description: Key from the part that the lineitem describes a purchase/shipment of

properties.name: supplier_key
properties.description: Key from the supplier that the lineitem describes a purchase/shipment from

properties.name: line_number
properties.description: The line number of the lineitem within the order. Each lineitem within an order has its own line number, and represents a purchase of a part from a supplier within the order.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: The number of units of the part that is being purchased in the lineitem, as a number between 1 and 50

properties.name: extended_price
properties.description: The extended price of the line item, which is the retail price of the part multiplied by the quantity purchased (before any discounts/taxes are applied). The price is rounded to the nearest cent and most of the values are between $900 and $100,000.

properties.name: discount
properties.description: The discount applied to the line item, which is a ratio between 0 and 1 representing percentage of the extended price. The percentage is always between 0% (0.00) and 10% (0.10)

properties.name: tax
properties.description: The sales tax applied to the line item, which is a ratio between 0 and 1 representing percentage of the extended price. The percentage is always between 0% (0.00) and 8% (0.08)

properties.name: status
properties.description: The status of the line item, which is always 'O' (for orders that have been placed but not yet filled, e.g. pending shipment) or 'F' (for orders that have been filled, e.g. already shipped)

properties.name: ship_date
properties.description: The date that the line item was shipped from the supplier/warehouse. The date is always between 1992-01-01 and 1998-12-31

properties.name: commit_date
properties.description: The date that the line item was committed to be shipped from the supplier/warehouse. The date is always between 1992-01-01 and 1998-12-31. The ship date is ideally before or on the actual commit date, but can be after it if the shipment was delayed.

properties.name: receipt_date
properties.description: The date that the line item was received by the customer. The date is always between 1992-01-01 and 1998-12-31. The receipt date is after the ship date due to the time to ship the package.

properties.name: ship_instruct
properties.description: The shipping instructions for the line item, which is always 'DELIVER IN PERSON', 'TAKE BACK RETURN', 'COLLECT COD' or 'NONE'

properties.name: ship_mode
properties.description: The shipping mode for the line item, which is always 'AIR', 'AIR REG', 'FOB', 'MAIL' or 'SHIP'

properties.name: return_flag
properties.description: The return flag for the line item, which is always 'R' (for returned items) or 'N' (for non-returned items)

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Commentary/remark on the line item

collections.description: The line items for shipments within an order. Each line item within an order has its own line number, and represents a purchase of a part from a supplier within the order. The order can contain multiple lineitems from different suppliers for different parts, and the lineitems can each have their own shipping information.

collections.name: supply_records

properties.name: part_key
properties.description: Key from the part that the supply record belongs to

properties.name: supplier_key
properties.description: Key from the supplier that the supply record belongs to

properties.name: available_quantity
properties.description: The number of units of the part that the supplier has available to supply. The quantity is usually between 1 and 1,000

properties.name: supply_cost
properties.description: The cost that it takes for the supplier to produce a single unit of the part. The cost is rounded to the nearest cent and most of the values are between $1 and $1,000.

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Commentary/remark on the supply record

collections.description: Every combination of a supplier and a part that the supplier supplies. Each record contains information about the supplier of the part, the part itself, and the availability of the part from the supplier.

collections.name: orders

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the order

properties.name: customer_key
properties.description: Key from the customer that placed the order

properties.name: order_status
properties.description: The status of the order, which is always 'O' for orders where all line items of the order have status 'O', 'F' for orders where all line items of the order have status 'F', and 'P' otherwise

properties.name: total_price
properties.description: The total price of the order after any discounts/taxes are applied, which is the sum of the extended price * (1 - discount) * (1 - tax) for all line items in the order. The price is rounded to the nearest cent and most of the values are between $800 and $600,000.

properties.name: order_date
properties.description: The date that the order was placed. The date is always between 1992-01-01 and 1998-12-31

properties.name: order_priority
properties.description: The priority of the order, which is always '1-URGENT', '2-HIGH', '3-MEDIUM', '4-NOT SPECIFIED' or '5-LOW'

properties.name: clerk
properties.description: The clerk that processed the order, which is always 'Clerk#<number>' where the number is prepended with zeros until it is 9 digits

properties.name: ship_priority
properties.description: The priority of the order for shipping, which is always 0

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Commentary/remark on the order

collections.description: The orders that have been placed by customers. Each order can contain multiple lineitems from different suppliers for different parts, and the lineitems can each have their own shipping information.

collections.name: customers

properties.name: key
properties.description: Unique identifier id for the customer

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the customer, which is always Customer#<number> where the number is the same as the customer's key, prepended with zeros until it is 9 digits

properties.name: address
properties.description: Address of the customer as a cryptographically encrypted string to anonymize the data.

properties.name: nation_key
properties.description: Key from the nation that the customer belongs to

properties.name: phone
properties.description: Phone number of the customer in the format 'CC-XXX-XXX-XXXX' where CC is the country code (each nation has a unique country code).

properties.name: account_balance
properties.description: The account balance of the customer in US dollars. The balance is rounded to the nearest cent and most of the values are between -$1,000 and +$10,000.

properties.name: market_segment
properties.description: The market segment that the customer belongs to, which is always 'BUILDING', 'FURNITURE', 'AUTOMOBILE', 'MACHINERY' or 'HOUSEHOLD'

properties.name: comment
properties.description: Commentary/remark on the customer

collections.description: The customers in the system within each nation. Each customer can have placed zero, one, or several orders.

relationships.name: nations
relationships.description: The nations contained within a region

relationships.name: region
relationships.description: The region that a nation is part of

relationships.name: suppliers
relationships.description: The suppliers belonging to a nation

relationships.name: nation
relationships.description: The nation that a supplier belongs to

relationships.name: customers
relationships.description: The customers belonging to a nation

relationships.name: nation
relationships.description: The nation that a customer belongs to

relationships.name: supply_records
relationships.description: The records indicating which companies supply the part

relationships.name: part
relationships.description: The part that a supply record belongs to

relationships.name: lines
relationships.description: The line items for shipments of the part

relationships.name: part
relationships.description: The part that a line item contains, e.g. what part is being shipped as part of an order

relationships.name: supply_records
relationships.description: The records indicating which parts the supplier supplies

relationships.name: supplier
relationships.description: The supplier that a supply record belongs to

relationships.name: lines
relationships.description: The line items for shipments from the supplier, e.g. all purchases made from the supplier

relationships.name: supplier
relationships.description: The supplier that a line item contains, e.g. what supplier is the part being purchased from as part of an order

relationships.name: part_and_supplier
relationships.description: The corresponding entry in the supply records detailing more information about the supplier of the purchase and the part that was purchased

relationships.name: lines
relationships.description: The line item instances of a part/supplier combination being purchased by a customer

relationships.name: order
relationships.description: The order that the line item belongs to

relationships.name: lines
relationships.description: The line items that belong to an order, each representing the purchase of a specific part from a specific supplier

relationships.name: customer
relationships.description: The customer that placed the order

relationships.name: orders
relationships.description: The orders that a customer has placed, each of which contains one or more line items

additional definitions: Revenue for a lineitem is the extended_price * (1 - discount) * (1 - tax) minus quantity * supply_cost from the corresponding supply record
A domestic shipment is a lineitem where the customer and supplier are from the same nation
Frequent buyers are customers that have placed more than 5 orders in a single year for at least two different years

verified pydough analysis.question: How many customers are in China?
What was the most ordered part in 1995, by quantity, by Brazilian customers?
Who is the wealthiest customer in each nation in Africa?

extra semantic info.intended use: Simulating decision support systems for complex ad-hoc queries and concurrent data modifications
extra semantic info.notable characteristics: Highly normalized schema with multiple tables and relationships, designed to represent a wholesale supplier's business environment
extra semantic info.data description: Contains information about orders. Every order has one or more lineitems, each representing the purchase and shipment of a specific part from a specific supplier. Each order is placed by a customer, and both customers and suppliers belong to nations which in turn belong to regions. Additionally, there are supply records indicating every combination of a supplier and the parts they supply.

collections.name: call_centers

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each call center record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key identifying the call center across SCD type 2 record versions.

properties.name: rec_start_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the call center record became effective (SCD type 2).

properties.name: rec_end_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the call center record expired. NULL indicates the current active record.

properties.name: closed_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing when the call center was permanently closed. NULL if still operational.

properties.name: open_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing when the call center opened for operations.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Official name or label of the call center location.

properties.name: size_class
properties.description: Classification tier of the call center based on size or capability.

properties.name: employees
properties.description: Total number of employees working at the call center.

properties.name: sq_ft
properties.description: Physical size of the call center facility in square feet.

properties.name: hours
properties.description: Standard operating hours of the call center.

properties.name: manager
properties.description: Full name of the manager responsible for running the call center.

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the market segment or region associated with this call center.

properties.name: market_class
properties.description: Classification or tier of the market this call center serves.

properties.name: market_desc
properties.description: Free-text description providing context about the market or audience served by this call center.

properties.name: market_manager
properties.description: Full name of the market-level manager overseeing this call center's market area.

properties.name: division
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the organizational division this call center belongs to.

properties.name: division_name
properties.description: Name of the organizational division this call center belongs to.

properties.name: company
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the company that owns or operates this call center.

properties.name: company_name
properties.description: Name of the company that owns or operates this call center.

properties.name: street_number
properties.description: Street number portion of the call center's physical address.

properties.name: street_name
properties.description: Street name portion of the call center's physical address.

properties.name: street_type
properties.description: Street type suffix of the call center's physical address.

properties.name: suite_number
properties.description: Suite or unit number within the building for the call center's address.

properties.name: city
properties.description: City where the call center is physically located.

properties.name: county
properties.description: County or administrative region where the call center is located.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation where the call center is located.

properties.name: zip_code
properties.description: Postal ZIP code of the call center's physical address.

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country where the call center is physically located.

properties.name: gmt_offset
properties.description: Timezone offset from GMT/UTC in hours for the call center's location.

properties.name: tax_percentage
properties.description: Local tax rate percentage applicable to the call center's jurisdiction.

collections.description: Dimension table containing information about call centers, including location, staffing, operational details, and organizational hierarchy.

collections.name: catalog_pages

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each catalog page record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key identifying the catalog page across SCD type 2 record versions.

properties.name: start_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date this catalog page became active.

properties.name: end_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date this catalog page was discontinued. NULL if still active.

properties.name: department
properties.description: Name of the department or product category featured on this catalog page.

properties.name: catalog_number
properties.description: Identifier of the catalog edition or issue this page belongs to.

properties.name: page_number
properties.description: Sequential page number of this page within its catalog edition.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Free-text description of the content or theme featured on this catalog page.

properties.name: category
properties.description: Type or format classification of the catalog page (e.g., featured, promotional, standard).

collections.description: Dimension table representing individual pages within product catalogs, including page metadata, department association, and catalog edition details.

collections.name: catalog_returns

properties.name: returned_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the catalog item was returned.

properties.name: returned_time_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the time dimension representing the time of day the return was processed.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product that was returned.

properties.name: refunded_customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer who received the refund.

properties.name: refunded_customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the refunded customer.

properties.name: refunded_household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the refunded customer.

properties.name: refunded_address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the address associated with the refunded customer.

properties.name: customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer who physically made the return (may differ from the refunded customer).

properties.name: customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.name: household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.name: address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the address of the customer making the return.

properties.name: call_center_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the call center dimension identifying the call center that handled the return.

properties.name: catalog_page_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the catalog page dimension identifying the page from which the returned item was originally ordered.

properties.name: ship_mode_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the ship mode dimension identifying the shipping method used for the return.

properties.name: warehouse_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the warehouse dimension identifying the warehouse that received the returned item.

properties.name: reason_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the reason dimension identifying the stated reason for the return.

properties.name: order_number
properties.description: Identifier of the original catalog sales order associated with this return.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item returned.

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Pre-tax monetary value of the returned items.

properties.name: tax
properties.description: Tax amount refunded as part of the return.

properties.name: amount_inc_tax
properties.description: Total return amount including tax.

properties.name: fee
properties.description: Fee charged to the customer for processing the return (e.g., restocking fee).

properties.name: ship_cost
properties.description: Shipping cost incurred for returning the item to the warehouse.

properties.name: refunded_cash
properties.description: Amount refunded to the customer in cash or original payment method.

properties.name: reversed_charge
properties.description: Amount reversed on the customer's credit card or charge account as part of the refund.

properties.name: store_credit
properties.description: Amount issued as store credit to the customer instead of a cash refund.

properties.name: net_loss
properties.description: Net financial loss to the business resulting from the return, accounting for refunds, fees, and shipping costs.

collections.description: Fact table recording catalog return transactions, including references to the returned item, customers involved, refund method breakdowns, and associated financial metrics.

collections.name: catalog_sales

properties.name: sold_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the catalog order was placed.

properties.name: sold_time_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the time dimension representing the time of day the order was placed.

properties.name: ship_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the order was shipped.

properties.name: bill_customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer who is billed for the order.

properties.name: bill_customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the billing customer.

properties.name: bill_household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the billing customer.

properties.name: bill_address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the billing address of the order.

properties.name: ship_customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer receiving the shipment (may differ from billing customer).

properties.name: ship_customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the shipping customer.

properties.name: ship_household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the shipping customer.

properties.name: ship_address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the delivery address of the order.

properties.name: call_center_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the call center dimension identifying the call center that processed the order.

properties.name: catalog_page_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the catalog page dimension identifying the page from which the item was ordered.

properties.name: ship_mode_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the ship mode dimension identifying the shipping method used for the order.

properties.name: warehouse_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the warehouse dimension identifying the warehouse that fulfilled the order.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product sold.

properties.name: promo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the promotion dimension identifying any promotion applied to the order.

properties.name: order_number
properties.description: Identifier of the catalog sales order. Multiple line items can share the same order number.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item ordered.

properties.name: wholesale_cost
properties.description: Per-unit cost paid by the retailer to acquire the item.

properties.name: list_price
properties.description: Per-unit catalog listed price before any discounts or promotions.

properties.name: sales_price
properties.description: Actual per-unit price charged to the customer after discounts.

properties.name: ext_discount_amount
properties.description: Total extended discount amount for the line item (discount per unit × quantity).

properties.name: ext_sales_price
properties.description: Total extended sales price for the line item (sales price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_wholesale_cost
properties.description: Total extended wholesale cost for the line item (wholesale cost × quantity).

properties.name: ext_list_price
properties.description: Total extended list price for the line item (list price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_tax
properties.description: Total tax amount applied to the line item.

properties.name: coupon_amount
properties.description: Monetary value of any coupon applied to the line item.

properties.name: ext_ship_cost
properties.description: Total shipping cost for the line item.

properties.name: net_paid
properties.description: Net amount paid by the customer excluding tax and shipping.

properties.name: net_paid_inc_tax
properties.description: Net amount paid by the customer including tax but excluding shipping.

properties.name: net_paid_inc_ship
properties.description: Net amount paid by the customer including shipping but excluding tax.

properties.name: net_paid_inc_ship_tax
properties.description: Total amount paid by the customer including both shipping and tax.

properties.name: net_profit
properties.description: Net profit on the line item, calculated as net paid minus wholesale cost.

collections.description: Fact table recording individual catalog sales transactions, including dimension references for customers, items, promotions, and logistics, along with detailed pricing and financial metrics per line item.

collections.name: customers

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each customer record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying a customer across system versions.

properties.name: current_customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension representing the customer's current demographic profile.

properties.name: current_household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension representing the customer's current household profile.

properties.name: current_address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension representing the customer's current address.

properties.name: first_shipto_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date of the customer's first shipment received.

properties.name: first_sales_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date of the customer's first purchase.

properties.name: salutation
properties.description: Courtesy title or salutation used to address the customer.

properties.name: first_name
properties.description: Customer's first (given) name.

properties.name: last_name
properties.description: Customer's last (family) name.

properties.name: preferred_customer_flag
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the customer is classified as a preferred/loyalty customer.

properties.name: birth_day
properties.description: Day of the month the customer was born.

properties.name: birth_month
properties.description: Month of the year the customer was born.

properties.name: birth_year
properties.description: Year the customer was born.

properties.name: birth_country
properties.description: Country where the customer was born.

properties.name: login
properties.description: Customer's login username for online account access.

properties.name: email
properties.description: Customer's email address for communications and account identification.

properties.name: last_review_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the customer record was last reviewed or updated.

collections.description: Dimension table containing customer profile information including personal details, demographic references, and key lifecycle dates.

collections.name: addresses

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each address record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying an address across system versions.

properties.name: street_number
properties.description: Street number portion of the address.

properties.name: street_name
properties.description: Street name portion of the address.

properties.name: street_type
properties.description: Street type suffix of the address (e.g., Ave, Blvd, St).

properties.name: suite_number
properties.description: Suite or apartment unit number within the building.

properties.name: city
properties.description: City of the address.

properties.name: county
properties.description: County or administrative region of the address.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation of the address.

properties.name: zip_code
properties.description: Postal ZIP code of the address.

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country of the address.

properties.name: gmt_offset
properties.description: Timezone offset from GMT/UTC in hours for the address location.

properties.name: location_type
properties.description: Classification of the address location type.

collections.description: Dimension table containing customer address records, including full postal address details, geographic hierarchy, and location classification.

collections.name: customer_demographics

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each customer demographics profile record.

properties.name: gender
properties.description: Gender of the customer.

properties.name: marital_status
properties.description: Marital status of the customer.

properties.name: education_status
properties.description: Highest level of education attained by the customer.

properties.name: purchase_estimate
properties.description: Estimated annual purchase amount for the customer demographic segment, in dollars.

properties.name: credit_rating
properties.description: Credit rating classification of the customer.

properties.name: dependent_count
properties.description: Total number of dependents in the customer's household.

properties.name: employed_dependent_count
properties.description: Number of dependents in the customer's household who are employed.

properties.name: college_dependent_count
properties.description: Number of dependents in the customer's household who are enrolled in college.

collections.description: Dimension table containing customer demographic profiles including gender, marital status, education, credit rating, and household dependent information.

collections.name: dates

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each date record in the dimension.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying the date record.

properties.name: date
properties.description: Full calendar date value.

properties.name: month_seq
properties.description: Sequential month number counting from a fixed epoch, used for month-over-month comparisons.

properties.name: week_seq
properties.description: Sequential week number counting from a fixed epoch, used for week-over-week comparisons.

properties.name: quarter_seq
properties.description: Sequential quarter number counting from a fixed epoch, used for quarter-over-quarter comparisons.

properties.name: year
properties.description: Calendar year of the date.

properties.name: day_of_week
properties.description: Day of the week as a number, where 0 = Sunday and 6 = Saturday.

properties.name: month_of_year
properties.description: Month of the year as a number (1 = January, 12 = December).

properties.name: day_of_month
properties.description: Day of the month as a number (1–31).

properties.name: quarter_of_year
properties.description: Quarter of the calendar year (1–4).

properties.name: fiscal_year
properties.description: Fiscal year the date belongs to.

properties.name: fiscal_quarter_seq
properties.description: Sequential fiscal quarter number counting from a fixed epoch.

properties.name: fiscal_week_seq
properties.description: Sequential fiscal week number counting from a fixed epoch.

properties.name: day_name
properties.description: Full name of the day of the week.

properties.name: quarter_name
properties.description: Label identifying the quarter and year (e.g., 1998Q1).

properties.name: is_holiday
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the date is a public holiday.

properties.name: is_weekend
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the date falls on a weekend.

properties.name: is_following_holiday
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the date immediately precedes a public holiday.

properties.name: first_day_of_month
properties.description: Surrogate key of the first day of the month this date belongs to, referencing this same date dimension.

properties.name: last_day_of_month
properties.description: Surrogate key of the last day of the month this date belongs to, referencing this same date dimension.

properties.name: same_day_last_year
properties.description: Surrogate key of the equivalent date one year prior, used for year-over-year comparisons.

properties.name: same_day_last_quarter
properties.description: Surrogate key of the equivalent date one quarter prior, used for quarter-over-quarter comparisons.

properties.name: is_current_day
properties.description: Flag indicating whether this date is the current day relative to the data snapshot.

properties.name: is_current_week
properties.description: Flag indicating whether this date falls in the current week relative to the data snapshot.

properties.name: is_current_month
properties.description: Flag indicating whether this date falls in the current month relative to the data snapshot.

properties.name: is_current_quarter
properties.description: Flag indicating whether this date falls in the current quarter relative to the data snapshot.

properties.name: is_current_year
properties.description: Flag indicating whether this date falls in the current year relative to the data snapshot.

collections.description: Date dimension table providing a comprehensive calendar and fiscal calendar breakdown for each date, including flags for holidays, weekends, and current period indicators used in time-intelligence reporting.

collections.name: household_demographics

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each household demographics profile record.

properties.name: income_band_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the income band dimension identifying the household's income range bracket.

properties.name: buy_potential
properties.description: Estimated purchasing potential range of the household, used for segmentation.

properties.name: dependent_count
properties.description: Total number of dependents in the household.

properties.name: vehicle_count
properties.description: Number of vehicles owned by the household.

collections.description: Dimension table containing household demographic profiles including income band, purchasing potential, dependent count, and vehicle ownership.

collections.name: income_bands

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each income band record.

properties.name: lower_bound
properties.description: Minimum annual household income value (in dollars) for this income band bracket.

properties.name: upper_bound
properties.description: Maximum annual household income value (in dollars) for this income band bracket.

collections.description: Dimension table defining household income band brackets with lower and upper bound ranges, used for household demographic segmentation.

collections.name: inventory

properties.name: date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date of the inventory snapshot.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product being tracked in inventory.

properties.name: warehouse_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the warehouse dimension identifying the warehouse where the inventory is held.

properties.name: quantity_on_hand
properties.description: Number of units of the item available in the warehouse at the time of the inventory snapshot.

collections.description: Fact table recording periodic inventory snapshots of item quantities held per warehouse, identified by a composite key of date, item, and warehouse.

collections.name: items

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each item record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key identifying the item across SCD type 2 record versions.

properties.name: rec_start_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the item record became effective (SCD type 2).

properties.name: rec_end_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the item record expired. NULL indicates the current active record.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Free-text description of the item.

properties.name: current_price
properties.description: Current retail selling price of the item.

properties.name: wholesale_cost
properties.description: Cost paid by the retailer to acquire the item from the supplier.

properties.name: brand_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the brand the item belongs to.

properties.name: brand
properties.description: Name of the brand the item belongs to.

properties.name: class_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the product class the item belongs to.

properties.name: item_class
properties.description: Product class grouping the item within its category (sub-category level).

properties.name: category_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the product category the item belongs to.

properties.name: category
properties.description: Top-level product category the item belongs to.

properties.name: manufacturer_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the manufacturer that produces the item.

properties.name: manufacturer
properties.description: Name of the manufacturer that produces the item.

properties.name: size
properties.description: Size classification of the item.

properties.name: formulation
properties.description: Formulation or composition descriptor of the item, typically used for consumable or chemical products.

properties.name: color
properties.description: Primary color of the item.

properties.name: units
properties.description: Unit of measure in which the item is sold.

properties.name: container
properties.description: Type of packaging or container the item is sold in.

properties.name: manager_id
properties.description: Identifier of the product manager responsible for this item.

properties.name: product_name
properties.description: Commercial name of the product.

collections.description: Dimension table containing product (item) details including pricing, classification hierarchy (category, class, brand), physical attributes, and manufacturer information, tracked as SCD type 2 records.

collections.name: promotions

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each promotion record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying the promotion.

properties.name: start_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the promotion becomes active.

properties.name: end_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the promotion expires.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product this promotion applies to.

properties.name: cost
properties.description: Total cost incurred to run the promotion.

properties.name: response_target
properties.description: Target number of customer responses or conversions expected from the promotion.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name or label of the promotion.

properties.name: channel_dmail
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via direct mail.

properties.name: channel_email
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via email.

properties.name: channel_catalog
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via catalog.

properties.name: channel_tv
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via television.

properties.name: channel_radio
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via radio.

properties.name: channel_press
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via press or print media.

properties.name: channel_event
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via in-person events.

properties.name: channel_demo
properties.description: Flag indicating whether the promotion was distributed via product demonstrations.

properties.name: channel_details
properties.description: Free-text details describing the promotion channels or additional distribution notes.

properties.name: purpose
properties.description: Business purpose or objective of the promotion.

properties.name: is_discount_active
properties.description: Flag indicating whether a discount is currently active as part of this promotion.

collections.description: Dimension table containing promotion records including active channels, costs, targets, and associated items, used to analyze marketing campaign effectiveness across sales transactions.

collections.name: reasons

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each return reason record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying the return reason.

properties.name: description
properties.description: Human-readable description of the return reason.

collections.description: Dimension table containing the set of valid reasons a customer may provide when returning an item.

collections.name: ship_modes

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each shipping mode record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying the shipping mode.

properties.name: shipping_type
properties.description: Type or category of the shipping mode.

properties.name: code
properties.description: Short code identifying the shipping mode, typically used in order processing systems.

properties.name: carrier
properties.description: Name of the carrier or logistics provider handling the shipment.

properties.name: contract
properties.description: Contract or service agreement identifier associated with the shipping carrier.

collections.description: Dimension table containing shipping mode records including carrier, type, and contract details used to classify how orders are delivered to customers.

collections.name: stores

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each store record.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key identifying the store across SCD type 2 record versions.

properties.name: rec_start_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the store record became effective (SCD type 2).

properties.name: rec_end_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the store record expired. NULL indicates the current active record.

properties.name: closed_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the store was permanently closed. NULL if still operational.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Official name or label of the store.

properties.name: number_of_employees
properties.description: Total number of employees working at the store.

properties.name: floor_space
properties.description: Physical floor space of the store in square feet.

properties.name: hours
properties.description: Standard operating hours of the store.

properties.name: manager
properties.description: Full name of the manager responsible for running the store.

properties.name: market_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the market segment or region this store belongs to.

properties.name: geography_class
properties.description: Geographic classification of the store's location (e.g., urban, suburban, rural).

properties.name: market_desc
properties.description: Free-text description of the market or region this store serves.

properties.name: market_manager
properties.description: Full name of the market-level manager overseeing this store's market area.

properties.name: division_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the organizational division this store belongs to.

properties.name: division_name
properties.description: Name of the organizational division this store belongs to.

properties.name: company_id
properties.description: Numeric identifier of the company that owns or operates this store.

properties.name: company_name
properties.description: Name of the company that owns or operates this store.

properties.name: street_number
properties.description: Street number portion of the store's physical address.

properties.name: street_name
properties.description: Street name portion of the store's physical address.

properties.name: street_type
properties.description: Street type suffix of the store's physical address.

properties.name: suite_number
properties.description: Suite or unit number within the building for the store's address.

properties.name: city
properties.description: City where the store is physically located.

properties.name: county
properties.description: County or administrative region where the store is located.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation where the store is located.

properties.name: zip_code
properties.description: Postal ZIP code of the store's physical address.

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country where the store is physically located.

properties.name: gmt_offset
properties.description: Timezone offset from GMT/UTC in hours for the store's location.

properties.name: tax_percentage
properties.description: Local tax rate percentage applicable to the store's jurisdiction.

collections.description: Dimension table containing physical retail store details including location, staffing, organizational hierarchy, and operational metadata, tracked as SCD type 2 records.

collections.name: store_returns

properties.name: returned_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the item was returned to the store.

properties.name: return_time_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the time dimension representing the time of day the return was processed.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product that was returned.

properties.name: customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer who made the return.

properties.name: customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.name: household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.name: address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the returning customer's address.

properties.name: store_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the store dimension identifying the store where the return was processed.

properties.name: reason_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the reason dimension identifying the stated reason for the return.

properties.name: ticket_number
properties.description: Identifier of the original store sales ticket (receipt) associated with this return.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item returned.

properties.name: amount
properties.description: Pre-tax monetary value of the returned items.

properties.name: tax
properties.description: Tax amount refunded as part of the return.

properties.name: amount_inc_tax
properties.description: Total return amount including tax.

properties.name: fee
properties.description: Fee charged to the customer for processing the return (e.g., restocking fee).

properties.name: ship_cost
properties.description: Shipping cost incurred for returning the item to the store or warehouse.

properties.name: refunded_cash
properties.description: Amount refunded to the customer in cash or original payment method.

properties.name: reversed_charge
properties.description: Amount reversed on the customer's credit card or charge account as part of the refund.

properties.name: store_credit
properties.description: Amount issued as store credit to the customer instead of a cash refund.

properties.name: net_loss
properties.description: Net financial loss to the business resulting from the return, accounting for refunds, fees, and shipping costs.

collections.description: Fact table recording in-store return transactions, including references to the returned item, customer, store, and reason, along with refund method breakdowns and associated financial metrics.

collections.name: store_sales

properties.name: sold_date_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the date dimension representing the date the sale was made.

properties.name: sold_time_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the time dimension representing the time of day the sale was made.

properties.name: item_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the item dimension identifying the product sold.

properties.name: customer_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer dimension identifying the customer who made the purchase.

properties.name: customer_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the purchasing customer.

properties.name: household_demo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the purchasing customer.

properties.name: address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the customer's address at time of purchase.

properties.name: store_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the store dimension identifying the store where the sale occurred.

properties.name: promo_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the promotion dimension identifying any promotion applied to the sale.

properties.name: ticket_number
properties.description: Identifier of the store sales ticket (receipt). Multiple line items can share the same ticket number.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item sold.

properties.name: wholesale_cost
properties.description: Per-unit cost paid by the retailer to acquire the item.

properties.name: list_price
properties.description: Per-unit listed price before any discounts or promotions.

properties.name: sales_price
properties.description: Actual per-unit price charged to the customer after discounts.

properties.name: ext_discount_amount
properties.description: Total extended discount amount for the line item (discount per unit × quantity).

properties.name: ext_sales_price
properties.description: Total extended sales price for the line item (sales price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_wholesale_cost
properties.description: Total extended wholesale cost for the line item (wholesale cost × quantity).

properties.name: ext_list_price
properties.description: Total extended list price for the line item (list price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_tax
properties.description: Total tax amount applied to the line item.

properties.name: coupon_amount
properties.description: Monetary value of any coupon applied to the line item.

properties.name: net_paid
properties.description: Net amount paid by the customer excluding tax.

properties.name: net_paid_inc_tax
properties.description: Net amount paid by the customer including tax.

properties.name: net_profit
properties.description: Net profit on the line item, calculated as net paid minus wholesale cost.

collections.description: Fact table recording individual in-store sales transactions, including dimension references for customers, items, promotions, and store location, along with detailed pricing and financial metrics per line item.

collections.name: times

properties.name: key
properties.description: Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each time-of-day record in the dimension.

properties.name: _id
properties.description: Business/natural key uniquely identifying the time-of-day record.

properties.name: time
properties.description: Time of day expressed as the number of seconds elapsed since midnight.

properties.name: hour
properties.description: Hour component of the time in 24-hour format (0–23).

properties.name: minute
properties.description: Minute component of the time (0–59).

properties.name: second
properties.description: Second component of the time (0–59).

properties.name: am_pm
properties.description: AM or PM indicator for the time of day.

properties.name: shift
properties.description: Work shift classification the time falls within.

properties.name: sub_shift
properties.description: Finer-grained sub-division of the shift period.

properties.name: meal_time
properties.description: Meal period classification associated with the time of day, if applicable.

collections.description: Time-of-day dimension table providing granular time breakdowns including hour, minute, second, shift, and meal period classifications for time-based analysis of transactions.

properties.name: sq_ft

properties.name: street_type

properties.name: suite_number
properties.description: Suite or unit number within the building for the warehouse's address.

properties.name: city

properties.name: county

properties.name: state

properties.name: zip_code
properties.description: Postal ZIP code of the warehouse's physical address.

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country where the warehouse is physically located.

properties.name: gmt_offset
properties.description: Timezone offset from GMT/UTC in hours for the warehouse's location.

properties.name: _id

properties.name: rec_start_date
properties.description: Date when this version of the web page record became effective (SCD type 2).

properties.name: rec_end_date

properties.name: image_count
properties.description: Number of images present on the web page.

properties.name: max_ad_count
properties.description: Maximum number of advertisements that can be displayed on the web page.

properties.name: returned_date_key

properties.description: Foreign key to the customer demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.description: Foreign key to the household demographics dimension for the returning customer.

properties.name: returning_address_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the address dimension for the address of the customer making the return.

properties.name: web_page_key
properties.description: Foreign key to the web page dimension identifying the page from which the returned item was originally ordered.

properties.name: reason_key

properties.description: Identifier of the original web sales order associated with this return.

properties.name: return_quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item returned.

properties.name: return_amount
properties.description: Pre-tax monetary value of the returned items.

properties.name: return_tax
properties.description: Tax amount refunded as part of the return.

properties.description: Total return amount including tax.

properties.name: fee
properties.description: Fee charged to the customer for processing the return (e.g., restocking fee).

properties.name: return_ship_cost
properties.description: Shipping cost incurred for returning the item to the warehouse.

properties.name: refunded_cash
properties.description: Amount refunded to the customer in cash or original payment method.

properties.name: reversed_charge
properties.description: Amount reversed on the customer's credit card or charge account as part of the refund.

properties.name: account_credit
properties.description: Amount issued as online account credit to the customer instead of a cash refund.

properties.name: net_loss
properties.description: Net financial loss to the business resulting from the return, accounting for refunds, fees, and shipping costs.

properties.name: order_number
properties.description: Identifier of the web sales order. Multiple line items can share the same order number.

properties.name: quantity
properties.description: Number of units of the item ordered.

properties.name: wholesale_cost
properties.description: Per-unit cost paid by the retailer to acquire the item.

properties.name: list_price
properties.description: Per-unit listed price before any discounts or promotions.

properties.name: sales_price
properties.description: Actual per-unit price charged to the customer after discounts.

properties.name: ext_discount_amount
properties.description: Total extended discount amount for the line item (discount per unit × quantity).

properties.description: Total extended sales price for the line item (sales price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_wholesale_cost
properties.description: Total extended wholesale cost for the line item (wholesale cost × quantity).

properties.name: ext_list_price
properties.description: Total extended list price for the line item (list price × quantity).

properties.name: ext_tax
properties.description: Total tax amount applied to the line item.

properties.name: coupon_amount
properties.description: Monetary value of any coupon applied to the line item.

properties.name: ext_ship_cost

properties.name: net_profit
properties.description: Net profit on the line item, calculated as net paid minus wholesale cost.

properties.description: Street name portion of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: street_type
properties.description: Street type suffix of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: suite_number
properties.description: Suite or unit number of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: city
properties.description: City of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: county
properties.description: County or administrative region of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: state
properties.description: Two-letter US state abbreviation of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: zip_code
properties.description: Postal ZIP code of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: country
properties.description: Country of the web site's registered physical address.

properties.name: gmt_offset
properties.description: Timezone offset from GMT/UTC in hours for the web site's registered location.

properties.name: tax_percentage
properties.description: Local tax rate percentage applicable to the web site's registered jurisdiction.

collections.description: Dimension table containing web site details including organizational hierarchy, market information, operational metadata, and registered physical address, tracked as SCD type 2 records.
